title: _eval() seems evaluate the combo logic firstly?

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_in_clockeds_always_block
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clk) block with non-blocking assignment to a signal that depends on combinational logic

features.name: blocking_assignment_driving_input_to_combo_logic
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clk) block with blocking assignment driving an input signal used by combinational logic

features.name: combinational_continuous_assignment
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment to a wire using a function call that depends on an input driven by clocked logic

features.name: module_instantiation_with_interdependent_signals
features.description: Code should include module instantiation where the input port is driven by clocked logic and feeds combinational logic inside the submodule
